name: superwall-web
//version: Single source of truth for all publishable @superwall/* packages. Bump with `bun run version:set <semver>`, which stamps it into every package before publish. `workspace:*` deps resolve to this version at publish time.

scripts.publish:all:first: bun run build && bun run scripts/publish.ts --access public
scripts.publish:all: bun run build && bun run scripts/publish.ts
scripts.publish:all:dry: bun run build && bun run scripts/publish.ts --access public --dry-run
